viewsContainers.lsdyna-includes.title: LS-DYNA Project Tools
views.lsdynaIncludeTree.name: Include Tree
views.lsdynaKeywordIndex.name: Keyword Index
viewsWelcome.lsdynaIncludeTree.contents: Open an LS-DYNA file (`.k`, `.key`, `.dyna`), then run [Scan Include Tree](command:extension.scanIncludeTree) to inspect its include hierarchy.
viewsWelcome.lsdynaKeywordIndex.contents: Open an LS-DYNA file (`.k`, `.key`, `.dyna`), then run [Scan Keyword Index](command:extension.scanKeywordIndex) to list keywords used by the current project tree.
commands.scanIncludeTree.title: Scan Include Tree
commands.scanKeywordIndex.title: Scan Keyword Index
commands.keywordIndexSetLocal.title: Show Current File
commands.openToSide.title: Open to Side
commands.revealInExplorer.title: Reveal in Explorer
commands.lsdynaFormatSelection.title: Format LS-DYNA Cards
commands.lsdynaTab.title: Align Field and Move Next
commands.lsdynaShiftTab.title: Align Field and Move Previous
commands.lsdynaSelectCell.title: Select Current LS-DYNA Card Field
commands.openIncludeFile.title: Open *INCLUDE File
commands.selectKeyword.title: Select Current Keyword
commands.jumpToNextKeyword.title: Jump to Next Keyword
commands.jumpToPreviousKeyword.title: Jump to Previous Keyword
commands.openManual.title: Open LS-DYNA Manual
commands.configureManualsDir.title: Set LS-DYNA Manuals Directory
commands.lsdynaStatusDashboard.title: Open DynaSense Dashboard
commands.showHealthStatus.title: Show DynaSense Environment Status
config.manualsDir.description: Directory containing LS-DYNA PDF manuals. Use an absolute path or a path relative to the VS Code installation directory. On Windows, place SumatraPDF.exe in this directory for precise page jumps.
config.language.description: Select the extension language for views, commands, hovers, and messages.
config.additionalExtensions.description: Additional file extensions to associate with the LS-DYNA language.
config.scanner.fullScanLargeFiles.markdo:
Perform a full scan for the Include Tree and Keyword Index. When disabled, files larger than 500 KB are scanned only at the first and last 1,000 lines for better performance.

> **Warning:** Enabling this can make projects with very large mesh files slow to load.
config.ignoreFormattingKeywords.descript: Keywords or prefixes that should ignore automatic formatting, smart tab alignment, and comment auto-completion.
config.customValidKeywords.description: Custom valid keywords that should not be marked as errors. Keywords can include the leading asterisk (e.g., '*END'). You can also use a wildcard at the end (e.g., '*MAT_*') to match any keyword starting with that prefix.
config.enableTabNavigation.description: Enable smart Tab navigation and field overwrite selection in LS-DYNA cards. When disabled, Tab inserts spaces or tab characters normally.
config.statusBar.level.description: Controls the DynaSense status bar entry. Off hides it; Simple shows a compact state; Detail adds field and manual state.
Hide the DynaSense status bar entry.
Show a compact DynaSense status entry.
Show keyword, field, and manual state in the DynaSense status entry.
config.health.showFirstRunNotice.descrip: Show a one-time DynaSense environment status notice when an LS-DYNA file has setup items.
config.autoFormat.description: Experimental: choose when automatic LS-DYNA card formatting runs. Keep this disabled unless you are comfortable with edits when the cursor leaves a line.
config.autoFormat.enumDescriptions.onBlu: Experimental: format the current line when the cursor leaves it. This may rewrite card spacing unexpectedly.
config.largeFile.enableRendering.descrip: Enable syntax rendering, hover, formatting, and completion for extremely large files without a line limit. Disable this to save memory when working with 100k+ line files.
config.codeLens.showOnAllKeywords.descri: Show Select and Format CodeLens actions above every LS-DYNA keyword. When disabled, CodeLens appears only above keywords with optional card rows.
config.hover.previewMaxLines.description: Maximum number of lines to display in the *INCLUDE file hover preview.
